metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for software build processes using the compiler lens, capable of handling ambiguous scope inputs and producing a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for software build processes using the compiler lens, capable of handling ambiguous scope inputs and producing a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Artifact contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.; Output is valid JSON and can be directly compiled by SR8.; Ambiguous input is resolved through clear, conservative defaults or explicit flags.

in_scope.item: The agent shall ingest ambiguous scope inputs (e.g., missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) from a founder_operator in Canada, and output a structured artifact that includes objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections suitable for SR8 compilation.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Artifact contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Output is valid JSON and can be directly compiled by SR8.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Ambiguous input is resolved through clear, conservative defaults or explicit flags.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.audit_scope: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for software build processes using the compiler lens, capable of handling ambiguous scope inputs and producing a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_policy: Use source evidence and mark unsupported claims.

inspection_steps.item: The agent shall ingest ambiguous scope inputs (e.g., missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) from a founder_operator in Canada, and output a structured artifact that includes objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections suitable for SR8 compilation.

findings_contract.item: Artifact contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable.
Output is valid JSON and can be directly compiled by SR8.
Ambiguous input is resolved through clear, conservative defaults or explicit flags.

receipt_contract.item: required_fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object

validation_gates: Gate 1: Verify all five compiled_intent sections are present and non-empty.; Gate 2: Confirm artifact_type matches expected value from case.; Gate 3: Ensure should_block is false and blocked_reason is null.; Gate 4: Validate JSON structure against schema.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
